title: Collection Persistence, Versioned Schemas, Atomic Replacement, and Restore · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Atomic Replacement
summary: The program writes live maps directly to the final file, trusts arbitrary JSON on load, has no schema version, loses permissions on replacement, and cannot recover from interruption. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go atomic replacement increment in versioned atomic offline collection store. Learners progress through prediction…
objectives: Write and sync a temporary file as required, preserve intended permissions, replace safely per platform, and clean abandoned temporary state.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
